ValidationRule.description:
This is the rule that runs when the filed below is not populated when the user tries to case a close
Termination Request Date Primary Reason
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $RecordType.DeveloperName = "Clinician_Offboarding", ISPICKVAL(Type, "SCP"), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Closed_Reason__c, "Complete"), OR( ISBLANK(Termination_Request_Date__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Reason_for_Termination__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please complete all required termination details before closing the case: Termination Request Date and Reason for Termination.
